description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow for a MacOSX companion that runs daily at 23:20. The workflow checks out the repository, sets up a build environment, installs Qt 5.12.9, ARM toolchain, dfu-util, libusb, libsdl, and lftp. It then configures CMake, builds the project, and archives the production artifacts. A subsequent ubuntu-latest job downloads the artifacts and publishes them with a 'nightly' tag.
